not-found.tsx + EmptyState in FilmDetailClient confirmed in engineering review

RefundClient: both 'unconfirmed' and 'confirmed' states exercised in prior session

synthetic_nonclaims.nonclaim: OneReel is a synthetic demo. Films, makers, and payments are fictional — no real charges, no real distribution.
Demo checkout — synthetic payment, no real charge. Any details work; a card ending in 0002 simulates a decline.
Demo listing — no real upload. Your film joins the catalog in this browser, priced and credited to you.
A receipt and your film link are on their way to your email. (demo context — no real email)
Demo refund — synthetic, like the payment. Nothing was really charged.

test_matrix.mobile_responsive: 375px viewport: all routes render, form fields labeled, order summary present on checkout

impeccable_critique.method: dual-pathway (Assessment A sub-agent + Assessment B inline)
impeccable_critique.ai_slop_verdict: NOT AI SLOP — clear no. All absolute-ban patterns absent. Committed brand identity; identity-preservation exception applies.
impeccable_critique.cognitive_load: 8/8 pass — every screen single primary action, no competing CTAs

priority_issues.description: if (!ready) return null — no skeleton during hydration on FilmDetailClient, CheckoutClient, BackedClient, RefundClient
CheckoutClient has no back link to film detail — browser back only
Validation fires only on submit; focus not moved to first error
Refund button (outlined ember) visually heavier than Keep the film text link
CVC field lacks hint text; aria-describedby only wires errors, not static description

evidence_quality.notes: Score 3: screenshots not available (browser pane not displayable). read_page + page text is the evidence format. Evidence is fresh and target-surface specific.

overall_notes: QA stage complete. All 7 routes pass happy-path verification. Zero console errors. Five synthetic nonclaims confirmed on all transaction surfaces. Zero P0 findings. The impeccable critique scores 30/40 Nielsen (75%) confirming a solid, operable app with a genuine brand identity. The two P1 findings (hydration blank, no checkout back-nav) and two P2 findings (submit-only validation, refund button hierarchy) are documented for iteration stage. No findings block QA advance. Score: 18/20 (90%) → passes advance threshold (84%).
